highlights: 359 of 484 S&P 500 stocks matched at least one rule — 74.2% breadth
FANG+: 0 of 8 names matched at least one rule
Top conviction (5+ rules): ALRS, ASTE, AXSM, INDV, IRM, PODC, TTMI, VIAV
Earnings this week: AVB, FULC, NWBI, PSA, VTR, VZ, DPZ, GABC — watch for elevated implied volatility
newsSummary: Today's market activity for these high-priority stocks shows a clear upward trend driven by strong earnings reports and strategic developments. Several companies, including ALRS, IRM, TTMI, and VIAV, released Q1 earnings transcripts and summaries, with Iron Mountain (IRM) topping estimates due to data center strength, and TTM Technologies (TTMI) soaring after record AI and defense-driven results. Viavi Solutions (VIAV) also saw its revenue climb significantly, fueled by robust demand and a surging data center market. Axsome Therapeutics (AXSM) experienced a boost with an FDA nod for its Alzheimer’s agitation drug, setting a June launch. Meanwhile, PodcastOne (PODC) anticipates record FY 2026 results and announced a new interim CFO, indicating strong growth projections and strategic financial management. Indivior Pharmaceuticals (INDV) shows momentum, while Astec Industries (ASTE) is poised for its Q1 earnings report, with expectations for positive outcomes.

ruleSets.name: Bullish MA Stack
ruleSets.description: Price above EMA-20, EMA-20 above SMA-50, RSI below 75 — full bullish MA alignment without being overbought.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Flag names where close > EMA-20 > SMA-50 and RSI < 75 — all MAs stacked bullishly, not overheated.

ruleSets.name: Golden Cross
ruleSets.description: SMA-20 crossed above SMA-50 today (prev day SMA-20 was <= SMA-50) — fresh crossover with price above SMA-20 and RSI in healthy range.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Find names where SMA-20 crossed above SMA-50 today (prev_sma_20 <= prev_sma_50), close > SMA-20, and RSI < 70 — fresh golden cross with price follow-through.

ruleSets.name: Dead Cross
ruleSets.description: SMA-20 crossed below SMA-50 today (prev day SMA-20 was >= SMA-50) — fresh bearish crossover with price below SMA-20.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Find names where SMA-20 crossed below SMA-50 today (prev_sma_20 >= prev_sma_50) and close < SMA-20 — fresh dead cross with price breaking down.

ruleSets.name: ATH Breakout
ruleSets.description: Flag tickers where price breaches the 52-week high on accumulating volume (≥1.5× avg).
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Flag the ticker when volume accumulates and the price breaches all-time high.

ruleSets.name: Near-ATH Consolidation
ruleSets.description: Price within 3% of 52-week high with quiet volume and RSI below 65 — tight coil before breakout.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Find names within 3% of their 52-week high on quiet volume with RSI under 65.

ruleSets.name: Oversold Dip in Uptrend
ruleSets.description: Price held above 50DMA (trend intact) while RSI dipped below 40 (short-term oversold).
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Find names above the 50DMA with RSI below 40 — classic dip-buy into trend support.

ruleSets.name: Pre-Earnings Momentum
ruleSets.description: Upcoming earnings (≤7 days) with price above 20DMA and RSI above 55.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Find names heading into earnings on positive price and momentum — pre-earnings run plays.

ruleSets.name: High-Volume Momentum Day
ruleSets.description: Big volume day (≥2× avg) with momentum confirming direction — institutional accumulation signal.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Flag names with volume at least 2x average, RSI above 55, and price above the 20DMA.

ruleSets.name: Strong Trending Day
ruleSets.description: Strong single-day gain (≥3%) on volume at least 1.5x average while above the 20DMA — momentum breakout.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Flag names with a 3%+ day on volume at least 1.5x average while above the 20DMA.

ruleSets.name: Near 52-Week Support
ruleSets.description: Price within 5% of the 52-week floor with RSI below 45 — testing major long-term support, potential reversal.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Find names within 5% of their 52-week low with RSI under 45 — buyers historically step in near the annual floor.

ruleSets.name: Pivot S1 Bounce
ruleSets.description: Price just above S1 pivot support (within 3%) with RSI below 50 — holding support after a test.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Find names where price is within 3% above S1 and RSI < 50 — pivot support holding, potential bounce entry.

ruleSets.name: Pivot R1 Breakout
ruleSets.description: Price closed above R1 pivot resistance on volume at least 1.5x average — clean resistance breakout.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Flag names where price closed above R1 on elevated volume — pivot resistance broken, next target R2.

ruleSets.name: TD Sequential Buy Setup
ruleSets.description: Nine consecutive closes each below the close four bars prior — classic DeMark exhaustion signal indicating selling pressure may be spent.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Flag when 9 consecutive bars close below close[i-4] — TD Sequential buy setup (神奇九转买入).

ruleSets.name: TD Sequential Sell Setup
ruleSets.description: Nine consecutive closes each above the close four bars prior — DeMark exhaustion signal indicating buying pressure may be spent.
ruleSets.naturalLanguage: Flag when 9 consecutive bars close above close[i-4] — TD Sequential sell setup (神奇九转卖出).
